overall.description: GTA V gameplay footage depicting a rainy night walk through urban Los Santos streets. The camera follows a character walking past commercial buildings, crossing a wet intersection, and entering a motel-style apartment complex courtyard. The scene features reflective wet pavement, street lighting, and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street trees and commercial buildings

events.description: pedestrian in light-colored dress runs across the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk, approaching intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: player character in striped shorts walking forward on sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story building with stone facade and illuminated windows
large mature trees with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk
dark colored SUV parked along the street curb
rain-soaked concrete pavement with reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk lined with mature trees on the left and a stone commercial building on the right. The player character moves toward an intersection ahead, while wet pavement reflects the street lighting. A pedestrian in light clothing briefly crosses the view near the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters the open intersection area
white sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection, navigating between traffic lights and observing passing vehicles

entered.detail: tall pole with red traffic signal illuminated
tall illuminated buildings visible in the downtown distance
tall sodium vapor lamps casting yellow light on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with wet asphalt reflecting streetlights. Traffic signals show red lights while a white sports car passes through. The camera moves through the crosswalk area, transitioning from the tree-lined sidewalk to the open street crossing with distant city lights visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with parked cars and apartment buildings

events.description: exits intersection and steps onto opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along residential sidewalk, passing parked cars and approaching apartment complex entrance

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with yellow stucco exterior and stone base
trimmed green bushes lining the building perimeter
blue recycling bins and black garbage cans on sidewalk edge
wooden power poles with overhead electrical lines

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk bordered by a yellow apartment building on the right and a street with parked cars on the left. The area features trimmed hedges, utility poles, and trash bins. The wet pavement continues to reflect the street lighting as the camera approaches a driveway entrance to an apartment complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment complex courtyard with parking and multi-story wings

events.description: turns right into the apartment complex courtyard from the street
navigates through the courtyard, turning left to follow the building perimeter

agents.ego_description: entering the apartment courtyard and walking through the interior parking area between building wings

entered.detail: interior parking courtyard with wet asphalt and puddle reflections
open-air walkways with railings on upper floors of the building
exterior staircase with metal railings leading to upper floors
parking spaces with several parked cars in the courtyard center

segments.scene_description: Entering the sheltered interior courtyard of a motel-style apartment complex, the scene becomes more enclosed with multi-story building wings surrounding a central parking area. The camera navigates through the courtyard past parked cars, exterior staircases, and balconies, with artificial lighting illuminating the wet pavement and creating reflections in the puddles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban environment that transitions from a tree-lined commercial street into the enclosed courtyard of a residential complex. It begins by moving along a sidewalk between mature trees and a stone building, where the wet pavement reflects the street lighting as a pedestrian crosses the path toward an intersection. As the camera reaches the wide crossing, the scene opens up to reveal a white sports car passing through the red lights of the intersection amidst distant city glows. The perspective then shifts toward a residential area, passing trimmed hedges and parked cars beside a yellow apartment building before approaching a driveway entrance. Finally, the camera enters the sheltered interior of a motel-style complex, moving through a central parking area surrounded by multi-story wings, exterior staircases, and balconies illuminated by artificial light.
